title: 3 Defense Stocks to Buy for Safe Dividends Now
text: There are plenty of reasons for investors to take a position in defense stocks. U.S. defense contractors tend to be safe and reliable investments.

title: 8% Yielding 'Strong Buy' REIT Preferred Shares
text: Many preferred stocks are now heavily discounted and offer high yields. Since real estate is well-known for its cash generation capabilities, REIT preferreds often offer better risk-to-reward. We discuss two REIT preferreds with yields above 8% for your consideration.

title: Rahul Gandhi Passport: Delhi court grants No Objection Certificate to Rahul Gandhi to get passport for three years.
text: New Delhi. A Delhi court on Friday granted No Objection Certificate (NOC) to Congress leader Rahul Gandhi for issue of "ordinary passport" for three years. Rahul Gandhi was disqualified as […]...

title: Private Space Stations Are Coming in 2025
text: Boeing, Lockheed Martin, and Northrop Grumman have all announced plans to begin building private space stations as early as 2027. One private space company, Axiom Space, says it will build its space station two years before that, in 2025.

title: U.S. Air Force to award sixth-generation fighter contract in 2024
text: The U.S. Air Force intends to award a contract in 2024 for its sixth-generation fighter jet, the service said on Thursday.

title: Northrop Grumman to Participate in Bernstein's 39th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., May 18, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) will participate in Bernstein's 39th Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on Thursday, June 1. Kathy Warden, chair, chief executive officer and president, and Dave Keffer, corporate vice president and chief financial officer, will present beginning at 9:00 a.m. Eastern time. The presentation will be webcast live at http://investor.northropgrumman.com .

title: Northrop Grumman (NOC) Announces an 8% Hike in the Dividend
text: Northrop Grumman (NOC) increases the quarterly dividend to $1.87 per share, reflecting a rise of 8% from the previous payout.

title: Northrop Grumman Increases Quarterly Dividend 8 Percent to $1.87
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., May 16, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The board of directors of Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) declared a quarterly dividend of $1.87 per share on Northrop Grumman common stock, payable June 14, 2023, to shareholders of record as of the close of business May 30, 2023.

title: Northrop Grumman Delivers Transformative Integrated Battle Command System for Poland's WISŁA Air Defense Program
text: HUNTSVILLE, Ala., May 15, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) has delivered key Integrated Battle Command System (IBCS) components for Poland's WISŁA medium range air defense program. With this delivery, IBCS moves closer to being fully fielded as part of Poland's advanced air and missile defense program.

title: Northrop Grumman Just Might Be the Best Space Stock to Buy
text: Northrop Grumman crushed its Q1 earnings report, beating earnings expectations with a stick. Northrop's space business wildly outperformed expectations, and is now the company's single biggest business.

title: Northrop Grumman to Webcast Annual Shareholders Meeting
text: FALLS CHURCH, Va., May 10, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation (NYSE: NOC) will conduct its annual shareholders meeting on Wednesday May 17 at the company's headquarters, 2980 Fairview Park Drive, Falls Church, Virginia. The official meeting also will be webcast beginning at 8 a.m. Eastern time at http://investor.northropgrumman.com. An audio replay will be available on the company's investor relations website for two weeks.

title: 3 Undervalued Dividend Stocks for Passive Income Lovers
text: Many investors may be enticed toward undervalued dividend stocks. Indeed, valuation is key for those with a long-term investing time horizon.

title: Northrop Grumman Overvalued Stock Crashed: What's Next?
text: War premiums drove stock prices high, too high. Northrop Grumman was overvalued at previous prices.

title: 3 Defense Stocks to Buy for the Long-Term Portfolio
text: Amidst macroeconomic uncertainty, equity markets are providing an excellent opportunity to consider exposure to some of the best defense stocks to buy. World military expenditure increased by 3.7% on a year-on-year basis for 2022 to $2.2 trillion.

title: Northrop Grumman's Integrated Battle Command System Achieves Initial Operational Capability
text: HUNTSVILLE, Ala., May 01, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Northrop Grumman Corporation's (NYSE: NOC) Integrated Battle Command System (IBCS) has achieved initial operational capability from the U.S. Army. With this declaration, the system is now ready to be fielded to U.S. Army units to further support the development of the system's capabilities.

title: 3 Drone Stocks to Watch for Sky-High Growth Potential
text: Over the past decade, the value of drone stocks has rapidly surged. During this time, drones have become more closely integrated with critical services, including identifying military targets in Ukraine and mapping out routes for vehicle navigational systems, thanks to technological advancements.
